replies.msg:
HKU website 上顯示 CP PsyD entrance requirements 只有兩個：

Programme Entrance Requirements

1.) A Master of Social Sciences in Clinical Psychology degree or an equivalent qualification

1.) Candidates shall satisfy the examiners in a qualifying examination, if required

所以：

1.）個網址冇話要registered CP 先可以報
2.）你話「讀完psychotherapy」是指咩學位先？舉個例子, counselling master 唔等於cp master.

當然你可以email HKU 問個清楚再報
